titleStmt.title: SII 9.75: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 75. (A.R. No. 81 of 1904.) ON THE THIRD SLAB SET UP ON THE NORTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 909, Sarvajit, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Ādityavāra corresponding to A.D. 987 April 3, Sunday, the tithi being current for about 4 hours on the next day. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Āhavamalladēva and states that while his Mahāsāmanta Āytavarma was ruling Kisukāḷu(ḍu) seventy and Kōgaḷi five-hundred, the fifty (Mahājanas) of Bāḷguḷi made a gift of a garden for the service of the god Ādityadēva consecrated by Duggimayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakanṛpakāḷātītasaṁvatsaraśataṁga 909 neya sarvvajitsaṁva
tsara pravarttise śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭāraka śrimat Ahavamalladēvana rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhivarddhamā
naṁ saluttire Āhavamalladēvapādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta Āytavarmma kisukāḷeḻpattuvaṁ
kōgaḻi Aynūṟuvaṁ nidhinidhānanikṣēpasahitaṁ duṣṭanigraha
viśiṣṭapratipāḷa(ṁ)naṁgeydāḷuttire bāḷguḷiyayvadiṁbaruṁ
duggimayyana pratiṣṭeya Ādityadēvargge maṇalapoḻeyoḷkoṭṭa
tōṇṭada kamma Aṟuvattu Ā tōṇṭava koṇindara kannayya tanna makkaḷmakkaḷba
ra salahiduṇba varṣaṁprativarṣa Āneya ponnāṟu gadyāṇamuṁ dharaṇa
ponna Ādatyadēvarge Ikkuva vaisākha suddha tadige Ādityavāradaṁdu ko
ṭṭa śāsana Idaṁ kādūḍidavarge prayāgeyoḷsāsirbbarppārvvargge kurukṣē
tradoḷsāsirbbarttapasviyargge Uṇalkoṭṭa bāṇanā(rā)siyoḷkavileya U
bhayamukhadānaṁgeyda phalaveyduguṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti
vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . chandōjana
maga hampa māḍida .
Digital edition of SII 9.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
